journal_red_flags: Omitting ablation studies or component-wise analysis to justify individual proposed modules
Lacking direct comparisons with recent state-of-the-art baselines on standard large-scale benchmarks
Presenting purely theoretical models without extensive empirical validation or system implementation details
Using low-resolution, poorly annotated, or overly simplified architecture diagrams that obscure the hierarchical design
Missing mathematical formulation or problem definition for the proposed method
Omitting computational complexity, latency, or hardware resource analysis
Overly promotional, subjective, or non-academic language in the abstract and conclusion
Using overly dense mathematical proofs without intuitive physical or geometric explanations
